requirements_addressed: Enhance apply_template() to copy template content (agents, rules, CLAUDE.md, manifest)
Template source resolution from package and user locations
Conflict handling (skip with warning, no overwrite)
Backward compatibility (no-arg init creates scaffold, template-not-found warns)
Skip code scaffold directories (templates/, config/, docker/)

completion_promises.criterion_text: guardkit init fastapi-python copies agents from agents/ to .claude/agents/
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented _copy_agents() which checks {template}/agents/ directory, filters for .md files (skipping .gitkeep), and copies to {target}/.claude/agents/. Test test_copies_agents_from_agents_dir verifies this with fastapi-python template structure.

completion_promises.criterion_text: guardkit init fastmcp-python copies agents from .claude/agents/ to .claude/agents/
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented _copy_agents() which also checks {template}/.claude/agents/ directory. Test test_copies_agents_from_dotclaude_agents_dir verifies this with fastmcp-python template structure.

completion_promises.criterion_text: guardkit init fastapi-python copies rules from template to .claude/rules/
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented _copy_rules() which recursively copies .claude/rules/**/*.md preserving directory structure. Test test_copies_rules_with_subdirectories verifies rules and subdirectory (guidance/testing.md) are copied.

completion_promises.criterion_text: guardkit init fastapi-python copies CLAUDE.md from template to project root
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented _copy_claude_md() which checks both root and .claude/ CLAUDE.md locations, copying whichever exists. Test test_copies_root_claude_md and test_copies_both_claude_md_when_both_exist verify this.

completion_promises.criterion_text: guardkit init default works without manifest.json (skip with info, not error)
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented _copy_manifest() which returns False gracefully when manifest.json is not present, logging an info message. Test test_skips_manifest_when_missing verifies no error is raised and no manifest.json appears in target.

completion_promises.criterion_text: guardkit init copies manifest.json to .claude/manifest.json when present
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented _copy_manifest() which copies manifest.json from template root to {target}/.claude/manifest.json. Test test_copies_manifest_json_when_present verifies content is copied correctly.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Existing files in target directory are NOT overwritten (skip with warning)
completion_promises.evidence: All copy operations use _copy_file_if_not_exists() which checks dest.exists() before copying and logs a skip message. Test test_does_not_overwrite_existing_files verifies existing agent and CLAUDE.md files are preserved.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Template not found produces a warning, not an error
completion_promises.evidence: apply_template() calls _resolve_template_source_dir() which returns None if template not found. apply_template logs a warning and returns True (success with scaffold only). Test test_template_not_found_warns_not_errors verifies this.

completion_promises.criterion_text: guardkit init with no args still creates basic scaffold
completion_promises.evidence: apply_template() always creates the basic directory structure (.claude/, tasks/, .guardkit/) before attempting template content copy. Test test_no_args_creates_basic_scaffold verifies all expected directories exist.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Template source resolved from installed package location
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented _get_templates_base_dir() using __file__-relative path to locate installer/core/templates/, and _resolve_template_source_dir() which checks package location first then falls back to ~/.guardkit/templates/. Test test_resolves_from_package_location verifies this.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit tests cover: all 7 templates, template not found, file conflict, agent location variants
completion_promises.evidence: TestApplyTemplateAllTemplates uses @pytest.mark.parametrize to test all 7 templates (default, fastapi-python, fastmcp-python, mcp-typescript, nextjs-fullstack, react-fastapi-monorepo, react-typescript). Additional dedicated test classes cover template not found (TestApplyTemplateNotFound), file conflict (TestApplyTemplateConflictHandling), and agent location variants (TestApplyTemplateCopiesAgents with agents/ and .claude/agents/).
